title: ferray-ufunc: no multi-axis reduction (reduce over multiple axes at once)
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy allows np.sum(arr, axis=(0, 2)) to reduce over multiple axes simultaneously. ferray-ufunc's add_reduce takes a single axis: usize. Reducing over multiple axes requires chaining calls, which is less efficient (creates intermediate arrays) and can produce wrong results if axes shift. Add support for reducing over a slice of axes or the whole array (axis=None equivalent).
